raw_consumer_statement:
While traveling in XXXX, XXXX, a local cab driver overcharged my credit card {$200.00} for a trip from the airport to my hotel, which at maximum would have been no more than {$40.00}. They attempted to swipe my card multiple times and told me the charge did not go through, when it in fact did. 

I disputed the charge with Citibank and provided all requested documentation that was available. Despite this, and multiple instances of attempting to resoling by phone and via e-mail, Citibank has reversed the conditional credit they issued and sided with the merchant. I have attempted to reopen this matter several times, without successful resolution.
